positive: A minimalist celestial forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central composition focuses on a symmetrical grouping of glowing crystal-leafed trees and stylized moon moths. The color palette is deep indigo, ethereal cyan, and vibrant lime green, highlighted by golden accents. Use a strong contrast, high-key lighting emanating from the flora, and clean, sharp silhouettes suitable for fabric printing. The style should be highly detailed vector illustration mixed with ethereal digital painting, achieving a blend of gothic nature and modern scientific diagram aesthetics. Intricate, clean linework, volumetric lighting, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, sloppy, messy, grain, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, logo, writing, cartoon, realistic photo, bokeh
